user.title: BJC Newsletter Setup
user.description: Enter your API credentials. Gemini extracts the schedule from the newsletter PDF. Browserbase provides a cloud browser to fetch it. Both are required.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid Gemini API key. Please check your key at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Gemini API. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check Home Assistant logs for details.

init.title: Update settings
init.description: Update your Gemini API key or model. Optionally add Browserbase credentials to enable automatic newsletter fetching on HA Green and other restricted environments. Get a free Browserbase account (no credit card) at https://www.browserbase.com

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Gemini API.
